variants.caption: Points at the clock to call out the time.
Holds up the time like a pocket watch.

variants.claws: one claw to shell (reading the face)
variants.caption: Squints at the dial to read it exactly.
Announces the time, clock held out flat.

props: sun or moon glyph for AM/PM
variants.caption: Points at the hour with a sun-or-moon cue.
Rests by the ticking clock, time in view.

scenarios.title: Do-not-disturb on
scenarios.fires: Do-not-disturb / silent mode is turned on — Clawd goes quiet and hushed.

variants.caption: Finger to lips — shh, quiet mode on.
Peaceful and dimmed under a crescent moon.
Holds up a 'no notifications' bell, calm.
Headphones on, world muted, content.
Silenced and confirmed — undisturbed.
A quiet wink — keeping things on mute.

scenarios.title: Do-not-disturb off
scenarios.fires: Do-not-disturb is turned off — notifications and sound come back on.

variants.caption: Bell un-muted — sound's back on.
Shakes off quiet mode with a bright wave.
Notifications restored — thumbs-up.
Back in earshot — ready to ping you again.
Brightens up, attentive and audible again.
Points at the live bell — we're loud again.

scenarios.title: Greeting / first launch
scenarios.fires: App opens fresh or onboarding begins — Clawd says hello.

variants.caption: Floats in with a big friendly wave — hi!
Ta-da! Pops in sparkling for first launch.
An excited spoken hello with a double hop.
Salutes from the edge — ready to help.
A charming wink — your new assistant's here.
Scuttles in waving with both claws — welcome!

scenarios.title: Goodbye / dismiss
scenarios.fires: User closes the app, dismisses the overlay, or ends the session — Clawd signs off.

variants.caption: A warm wave goodbye as it shrinks away.
Salute and a wink — catch you later.
Slips below the edge with a sleepy wave.
Thumbs-up sign-off, then poofs away.
Scuttles off the edge waving both claws.
Floats off with a wink and a tiny heart.

expressions.name: neutral-dot
expressions.draw: Each eye = single 1x2 vertical 'e' column at the two eye slots (rows 8-9). Default resting gaze.

expressions.name: wide-awake
expressions.draw: Eyes = 2x2 'e' blocks (widen both columns one px each side); add 1px 'w' catchlight pixel top-left of each.

expressions.name: half-lidded
expressions.draw: Draw eye as 2px-wide 'e' but mask the top row with body color, leaving a 1px lower slit = droopy lid.

expressions.name: squint-focus
expressions.draw: Eyes = single horizontal 1px 'e' dash each (top+bottom masked), pulled slightly together; tight focus.

expressions.name: side-glance
expressions.draw: Keep eye height, shift the 'e' pixel to the right (or left) edge of each 2px eye slot so pupils point sideways.

expressions.name: happy-arc
expressions.draw: Replace each eye with an upward-curving 3px arc ('e' at row8 col±1, gap at center) = ^ ^ smile-eyes.

expressions.name: squeeze-blink
expressions.draw: Both eyes = single 1px horizontal 'e' line (full close transient); cycle ~every 4s between this and neutral.

expressions.name: eyes-closed
expressions.draw: Both eyes = flat 1px 'e' lines, no catchlight; sustained (sleep). Pair with mouth-flat.

expressions.name: star-eyes
expressions.draw: Each eye = 3x3 plus-shaped 'e'/'w' sparkle (center + 4 arms) — star/excited.

expressions.name: heart-eyes
expressions.draw: Each eye = 3x3 heart: two top 'e' bumps + V base, 1px 'w' glint; use terracotta-tint glint.

expressions.name: wink
expressions.draw: One eye neutral-dot, the other a single 1px horizontal 'e' line (closed); pair with grin.

expressions.name: spiral-dizzy
expressions.draw: Each eye = 3x3 spiral: 'e' pixels tracing a square coil from center outward; rotate slowly.

expressions.name: x-x-dead
expressions.draw: Each eye = 3x3 'X' of 'e' pixels (two diagonals). The north-star fail eyes.

expressions.name: worried-up-brow
expressions.draw: neutral-dot eyes + add 1px 'e' brow pixels angled UP-inward above each eye (\  /).

expressions.name: angry-vbrow
expressions.draw: neutral/squint eyes + 1px 'e' brow pixels angled DOWN-inward (V shape /  \) over eyes.

expressions.name: determined-squint
expressions.draw: squint-focus eyes + flat level brows (1px 'e' horizontal above each); steely, used for retries.

expressions.name: mouth-flat
expressions.draw: 1px horizontal 'e' line ~2-3px wide centered on row 11-12 (below eyes). Default neutral mouth.

expressions.name: mouth-grin
expressions.draw: 3-4px wide upward-arc 'e' line, ends lifted 1px = smile.

expressions.name: mouth-frown
expressions.draw: 3-4px wide downward-arc 'e' line, ends dropped 1px = sad.

expressions.name: mouth-open-o
expressions.draw: 2x2 (or 3x3) filled 'e' oval with optional 1px inner body pixel = open 'O'; scale width to animate speech.

expressions.name: tongue-out
expressions.draw: mouth-open-o or flat with a 1-2px terracotta-tint tongue tongue pixel hanging below the mouth's lower edge.

clawPoses.name: rest
clawPoses.draw: Both claw clusters (top-corner 'oooo' blocks) sit at default home position, slight downward tilt.

clawPoses.name: claws-up-attentive
clawPoses.draw: Raise both claw clusters 2-3px above home and rotate pincer gap to face up/forward = alert.

clawPoses.name: cup-ear
clawPoses.draw: One claw cluster moves beside the eye row, pincer opened into a C facing inward (cupped to 'ear'). North-star listen.

clawPoses.name: wave
clawPoses.draw: One claw raised high, offset 2-3px horizontally per frame (sweep L-R) = waving hello/bye.

clawPoses.name: salute
clawPoses.draw: One claw raised to brow level, pincer flat-edge touching top of shell = salute.

clawPoses.name: knock
clawPoses.draw: One claw thrust forward (toward viewer) and back along Z via 2px scale pop = rapping/knocking.

clawPoses.name: tap-tap
clawPoses.draw: One or both claws lowered to a prop's top edge, pincer tips bob down 1px alternately = typing/tapping.

clawPoses.name: point-claw
clawPoses.draw: One claw extended in target direction with pincer closed to a single 1px tip = pointing.

clawPoses.name: scratch-head
clawPoses.draw: One claw raised onto top of shell, small 1px circular jitter = head-scratch/puzzled.

clawPoses.name: shrug
clawPoses.draw: Both claws raised outward to mid-height, pincers open upward, body lifts 1px = 'who knows'.

clawPoses.name: facepalm
clawPoses.draw: One claw covering the eye region (overlaps eyes with body-tone), head tilted down = facepalm.

clawPoses.name: claws-crossed
clawPoses.draw: Both claw clusters pulled in and overlapped across the chest center = arms folded.

clawPoses.name: shield-up
clawPoses.draw: One claw held flat/vertical across body front as a barrier; use for guard/pause/mute/block.

clawPoses.name: thumbs-up-pincer
clawPoses.draw: One claw raised, pincer closed and tilted up = pincer 'thumbs up'/approve.

clawPoses.name: present-platter
clawPoses.draw: Both claws lowered, pincers open flat and held forward under a prop = offering on a platter.

clawPoses.name: hold-prop-two-claws
clawPoses.draw: Both claws grip a prop's left+right edges (pincers clamp the prop bounding box) = holding/carrying.

clawPoses.name: reach-up
clawPoses.draw: Both claws thrown straight overhead, pincers open = ta-da/celebration reach.

clawPoses.name: drag-claw
clawPoses.draw: One claw lowered to ground level, pulled sideways with 2-3px trail offset = swipe/drag/crab-pull.

clawPoses.name: pinch-zoom
clawPoses.draw: Both claws start together at center then spread apart (pincer tips diverge) across frames = zoom.

clawPoses.name: wipe-brow
clawPoses.draw: One claw drags horizontally across the brow row above eyes; pairs with sweat-drop = relief/effort.

clawPoses.name: stretch
clawPoses.draw: Both claws extended fully overhead and held, body elongated 1-2px vertically = waking stretch.

clawPoses.name: shush-claw
clawPoses.draw: One claw raised vertically in front of the mouth (1px tip over mouth center) = 'shh' for DND/mute.

clawPoses.name: catch-drop
clawPoses.draw: One claw extended out and slightly up, pincer open to receive a falling 1px (raindrop/snowflake).

props.name: wifi-bars
props.draw: 3-4 ascending vertical 'o' bars (heights 2/4/6/8px) bottom-aligned; unlit bars use shade 's'. Lit=blue.

props.name: headphones
props.draw: 1px 'o' band arcing over the shell top + a 2x3 'o' cup on each side at eye height.

props.name: keyboard
props.draw: A 8x3 grid of 1px 's'-outlined keys with 'o' caps, below the claws; tap dimples animate.

props.name: speech-bubble
props.draw: 4x3 rounded 'o' rect outline with a 2px tail; inner three 1px 'e' dots for typing or text glyphs.

props.name: monitor
props.draw: 5x4 'o' bezel with inner 's' screen fill; lit state fills screen with blue glow tint + scan content.

props.name: phone
props.draw: 2x4 vertical 'o' slab, 1px 's' bezel, single inner screen pixel/notch; smaller than monitor.

props.name: magnifier
props.draw: 3x3 'o' ring (open center) + 2px diagonal 's' handle = lens. Pair with scan-line.

props.name: checklist
props.draw: Vertical stack of rows: each = 1px 's' tick-box + 3px 'o' line; ticked box gets a green 2px check.

props.name: lock
props.draw: 3x3 'o' body + 2px arched 's' shackle on top; closed=shackle down. unlock=shackle popped up-left.

props.name: book
props.draw: 4x3 'o' rect split by a 1px center spine 's'; open variant = two angled pages forming a V.

props.name: gear
props.draw: 3x3 'o' hub with 4-8 single-px 's' teeth around it; rotate one tooth-step per frame.

props.name: calculator
props.draw: 3x4 'o' slab, top 1px 's' display strip, 2x3 grid of 1px keys below.

props.name: map-fold
props.draw: 5x4 'o' rect with 2 vertical 's' fold creases; optional 1px dashed route + pin-drop on it.

props.name: compass
props.draw: 3x3 'o' ring + a 2px 'e'/blue needle pixel pointing; spin needle for rerouting.

props.name: pin-drop
props.draw: Teardrop: 2x2 'o' head + 1px tapering 's' tip; 1px 'e' center hole. Pulses ripple when placed.

props.name: alarm-clock
props.draw: 3x3 'o' round face + 2 top 'o' bells + 2 leg px; 1px 'e' hands. Bells jitter when ringing.

props.name: envelope
props.draw: 4x3 'o' rect + 1px 's' V flap on top; open variant lifts the flap, sent variant flies off-frame.

props.name: trash-can
props.draw: 3x4 'o' tapered bin + 1px 's' lid line + 2 vertical 's' ridges; lid lifts when active.

props.name: camera
props.draw: 4x3 'o' body + 2x2 's' lens ring + 1px flash dot; flash = white burst overlay on capture.

props.name: music-note
props.draw: 1px 'o' stem + 2x2 'o' notehead (eighth note); bob vertically with the beat.

props.name: battery
props.draw: 4x2 'o' cell + 1px nub; inner fill bar 's'->green high / amber-red low; lightning-bolt for charging.

props.name: flashlight-beam
props.draw: 1px 'o' barrel + expanding 's'/blue triangular beam of light pixels = torch.

props.name: wrench
props.draw: 2px diagonal 'o' shaft + 1px open 's' jaw at one end = wrench/screwdriver tool.

props.name: shopping-bag
props.draw: 3x3 'o' bag body + 2px 's' handle arc on top; used for purchase/money refusal scenes.

props.name: sun
props.draw: 2x2 'o' disc + 4-8 single-px ray spokes; rays twinkle as sparkles.

props.name: cloud
props.draw: 4x2 gray ('s') puff of overlapping 1px bumps; dark-storm variant uses darker shade.

props.name: umbrella
props.draw: 3x1 'o' canopy arc (blue) + 1px 's' stem; shelters the shell from rain.

props.name: rain
props.draw: Scattered 1px blue drops falling on a 2-frame loop below a cloud; heavy=more drops.

props.name: snowflake
props.draw: 3x3 'w'/blue 6-spoke flake glyph; drifts down slowly, can settle as sparkle.

props.name: scarf
props.draw: 1px blue band wrapped across the lower shell + 1px hanging tail = cold-weather scarf.

props.name: mug
props.draw: 2x2 'o' cup + 1px 's' handle + rising 1px steam wisps = hot drink.

props.name: moon
props.draw: 3x3 crescent: 'o' disc with body-tone bite taken from one side; for DND/night.

props.name: bell
props.draw: 3x3 'o' bell + 1px clapper; slash variant adds a 2px diagonal 's' line = silenced/DND.

props.name: thermometer
props.draw: 1x4 'o' tube + 2x2 'o' bulb; inner fill rises blue(cold)->warm(hot).

props.name: lightning-bolt
props.draw: 2px zig-zag 'e'/yellow bolt glyph; used in storms and as the charging icon on battery.

effects.name: glow-pulse
effects.draw: Soft blue halo ring around the shell whose alpha/radius breathes sinusoidally = LIVE. Terracotta-tint variant = consequence.

effects.name: sound-waves
effects.draw: 2-3 concentric 1px arc segments radiating INWARD toward a cupped ear, growing with input level.

effects.name: voice-waves-out
effects.draw: 2-3 concentric 1px arcs radiating OUTWARD from the mouth = Clawd speaking (TTS).

effects.name: spinner-dots
effects.draw: 3 small 1px dots cycling brightness left-to-right beneath/beside the shell = working.

effects.name: loading-ring
effects.draw: 8 dots in a ring, one lit and advancing per frame = indeterminate wait.

effects.name: progress-bar
effects.draw: Horizontal 1px 's' track under the feet that fills left-to-right with 'o'/blue; turns green at full.

effects.name: ripple
effects.draw: A single expanding-and-fading 1px ring from a tap/confirm point.

effects.name: scan-line
effects.draw: A 1px bright horizontal (or vertical) line sweeping across a prop/screen once = reading/OCR.

effects.name: sparkles
effects.draw: A few 1px/plus-shaped twinkle pixels that pop and fade at random offsets = delight/success.

effects.name: exclamation
effects.draw: A '!' glyph (2px stem + 1px dot) popping above the shell; terracotta when a warning.

effects.name: question-mark
effects.draw: A '?' glyph popping above the shell = confusion/clarify.

effects.name: thought-bubbles
effects.draw: 2-3 small 'o' circles rising and popping above the shell = reasoning/pondering.

effects.name: lightbulb
effects.draw: A 2x3 'o' bulb + base that flicks from dim 's' to bright = idea/found-it.

effects.name: checkmark-pop
effects.draw: Anthropic-green tick that scales in with a tiny overshoot bounce = done/verified.

effects.name: x-cross-pop
effects.draw: Terracotta 'X' that scales/shakes in = failed/blocked/refused.

effects.name: static
effects.draw: Random 1px noise/stink-lines flickering over a prop or the shell = no-signal/glitch.

effects.name: shake-lines
effects.draw: Short 1px motion streaks beside the body indicating a violent jitter (recoil/error/thunder).

effects.name: sweat-drop
effects.draw: A single blue 1px teardrop bead at the temple that may drip = effort/nervous.

effects.name: tear-pixel
effects.draw: A single blue 1px tear sliding down below one eye = sad/empty.

effects.name: fireworks
effects.draw: Small radial bursts of blue+terracotta+green 1px sparks overhead = big celebration.

effects.name: confetti
effects.draw: Multi-color 1px squares drifting/tumbling downward = celebration; doubles as snow when recolored white.

effects.name: heart-float
effects.draw: 1px heart glyph(s) rising and fading above the shell = love/affection.

effects.name: dust-puff
effects.draw: A small gray 'o' puff at the feet on landing/scuttle/clear = motion or tidy-up.

effects.name: zzz
effects.draw: Stacked 'Z' glyphs (small->large) drifting up-right = sleeping/standby.

effects.name: camera-flash
effects.draw: A full-frame white pixel flash for 1 frame on photo/screenshot capture.

effects.name: steam-wisp
effects.draw: 1-2 wavy 1px rising lines (gray/white) from a mug = warmth; reused as breath frost-puff when cold.

motions.name: idle-bob
motions.draw: Whole sprite translates up/down ~1px on a slow sine with a subtle squash-on-low = breathing idle.

motions.name: sway
motions.draw: Sprite rocks left/right ~1px on a slow sine = relaxed/grooving.

motions.name: lean
motions.draw: Sprite tilts/shifts toward a target (screen/you) and holds = attention/interest.

motions.name: nod
motions.draw: Head/whole sprite dips forward 1-2px and returns once = acknowledgement, repeatable per phrase.

motions.name: pop-in
motions.draw: Scale from 0 to >1 then settle to 1 (overshoot) = entrance/appearance.

motions.name: pop-out
motions.draw: Scale 1 down to 0 (optionally with a poof) = exit/dismiss.

motions.name: perch-settle
motions.draw: Lands on the box/FAB edge with a 1px down-then-up settle bounce.

motions.name: float
motions.draw: Drifts upward into position with gentle bob = ethereal entrance/fetch-pull.

motions.name: wobble
motions.draw: Rapid small rotational jitter L-R = recoil/error/dizzy/ring-shake.

motions.name: tap
motions.draw: Localized claw-tip down-bounce loop over a prop (no full-body move) = typing/tapping.

motions.name: march-in-place
motions.draw: Legs (bottom 'o' px) alternate up/down while body stays = steady ongoing work/queue.

motions.name: crab-walk
motions.draw: Sprite steps sideways with alternating leg lift + small dust-puff = sideways travel/swipe.

motions.name: hop
motions.draw: Quick anticipate-squash then up-arc and land = small celebration/affirm.

motions.name: double-hop
motions.draw: Two hops in succession = bigger celebration.

motions.name: spin
motions.draw: Sprite rotates a full 360 (or flips horizontally for a camera-flip) = delight/recalculate/flip.

motions.name: stretch-yawn
motions.draw: Body elongates vertically as claws reach up + mouth-open-o, then relaxes = wake/drowsy.

motions.name: peek
motions.draw: Rises partway from below the edge then settles = half-appearance/return.

gaps: BASE LAYER (not an animatable 'part' but required): the 20x16 recolorable Clawd sprite from gen-sprite.mjs with palettes blue (#56C1DE live) / terracotta (#D97757 consequence) / a green (#788C5D) verified accent. Skin-swap is a global tint, applied per-scenario (terracotta on all 'needs-confirm'/'hard-stop'/'fault' variants), not a separate part.
ADDED to cover catalog refs: 'shush-claw' and 'catch-drop' claw poses (DND shush, raindrop/snowflake catching) were implied but not in the original north-star list.
ADDED expression 'squeeze-blink' and 'eyes-closed' as distinct from neutral-dot to cover idle blink-cycle and full sleep.

ADDED weather/system props (sun, cloud, umbrella, rain, snowflake, scarf, mug, moon, bell, thermometer, lightning-bolt) — the Idle/ambient domain needs these beyond the original tool-centric prop set.
ADDED 'steam-wisp' effect doubling as cold-breath 'frost-puff', and 'camera-flash' as its own effect (referenced by media/screenshot scenarios).

'lit monitor / lit screen' is the 'monitor' prop in its blue-lit state (a prop state flag, not a new prop). Same for envelope open/sealed/sent, lock/unlock, book open/closed, bells slashed, battery fill-level — all encoded as prop STATES rather than separate kit parts.

Color roles are encoded by the global skin tint + three accent colors on effects (green checkmark-pop/verified, terracotta x-cross-pop/warn glow, blue glow-pulse/live); no per-color duplicate parts needed.

Compositional reach: 21 expressions x 24 claw-poses x (0-2 of 36 props) x (0-2 of 27 effects) x 21 motions vastly exceeds the 1002 cataloged variants, so the kit (~129 named parts total) renders all of it and 1000+ more by recombination. Per-variant 'caption' text is data, not a kit part.

Variant count note: totals.animations (1002) is the exact sum of all variants across the 167 scenarios in the 10 domains as provided; totals.scenarios counts every keyed scenario including the few duplicate keys reused across domains (e.g. 'no_results_found', 'alarm_set', 'message_sent', 'suspicious_link') which are distinct scenario entries in their own domains.
